data.title: Rochester Midland Corporation acquires Solid Blend Technologies, Inc. in an expansion move.
data.description: Rochester Midland Corporation, based in Rochester, N.Y., revealed on February 12, 2026, that they have successfully acquired Solid, a company specializing in route-based technical services and specialty chemical products. Rochester Midland is known for its offerings in water treatment and food safety, among other verticals. This acquisition strengthens the company's position in the market and expands its product range for customers.

data.title: Cambridge Wilkinson Investment Bank closes syndicated Series B SPV investment for AI infrastructure company, marking a significant milestone.
data.description: Today in New York, on February 12, 2026, the investment firm Cambridge Wilkinson disclosed the completion of a syndicated SPV investment in a Series B funding round for an AI hardware and technology company. This marks a major achievement for CW, signaling their continued support for companies in high-growth sectors.

data.title: Rizing Tide launches Tide Pool, a digital platform for PT students at CSM 2026, aiming to expand engagement.
data.description: A foundation is increasing involvement of physical therapy students through a new digital platform and on-site activities at CSM 2026 in Phoenix. Rizing Tide aims to broaden access to physical therapy and enhance inclusivity in the field. The initiative involves engaging with a larger number of students through the digital platform, along with hosting on-site programs at the mentioned event. This is part of the foundation's efforts to create a diverse and well-equipped workforce in physical therapy.

data.title: 22 leaders in research and education appointed to InCommon Steering and Advisory Committees in 2026 for secure collaboration.
data.description: Internet2 made a recent announcement on Feb. 12, 2026, appointing four fresh faces to the InCommon Steering Committee in addition to welcoming 18 new members to the InCommon Advisory Committees. This move strengthens community-led governance, which plays a crucial role in facilitating secure collaboration across a vast network of thousands.

data.title: Hyosung Heavy Industries, led by Hyun-Joon Cho, secures record US power market contract, largest in company's history.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on February 12, 2026, Hyosung Heavy Industries, led by Chairman Hyun-Joon Cho, has achieved a significant milestone by securing a major contract in the U.S. power market. This deal stands as the largest order in the company's history, highlighting its growth in the sector.

data.title: Shift in market: 'Old economy' stocks may be the new AI trade as AI spending reconnects physical & digital worlds. Capital-light tech models dominated post-2008 crisis; now, hyperscalers investing in AI infra impacting traditional sectors. Overcapacity in low-multiple value stocks ending. Goldman analyst Oppenheimer highlights shift. (Word count: 47)
data.description: Following the dominance of growth and tech companies in the market after the 2008 financial crisis, a shift may be occurring as outlined in a research note by Goldman Sachs analyst Peter Oppenheimer. The narrative is changing as "old economy" stocks are possibly emerging as the next AI trade. This shift is attributed to hyperscalers such as Amazon, Meta Platforms, and Alphabet who are investing heavily in building data centers and computing power, reconnecting physical and digital worlds. Sectors like utilities, power grids, and construction are seeing increased capital investment after years of neglect since 2008. This trend is further supported by investment in AI infrastructure and defense spending.

data.title: Timken awards scholarships worth up to $540,000 to 20 students globally, supporting diverse career paths.
data.description: In a recent event in North Canton, Ohio, on February 12, 2026, The Timken Company provided support for the educational future of 20 students. These students, pursuing various career paths, were awarded college scholarships in a special ceremony. The scholarships were granted to the children of employees of Timken, emphasizing the company's commitment to supporting education and workforce development.

data.title: BTG Pactual Timberland Investment Group buys over 107,000 acres of timberlands in Central Virginia for sustainable management.
data.description: BTG Pactual Timberland Investment Group has recently completed the acquisition of around 107,000 acres of responsibly maintained timberlands located in Central Virginia.

data.title: BNB price outlook: Oversold at $614, signaling possible $750 rebound by March 2026. Technical analysis hints at $750-$950 range.
data.description: BNB is currently valued at $614 and is considered oversold with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 24.93. According to technical analysis, there is a possibility of a rebound to a range between $750 and $950, despite experiencing a significant 33% drop from its peak in January.

data.title: Joint venture acquires Sotherly Hotels Inc.; Schulte Hospitality to manage portfolio.
data.description: Schulte Hospitality, a top hotel operator, is set to take over the management of the entire Sotherly Portfolio. This includes a total of X hotels across different locations. This move is expected to significantly strengthen Schulte Hospitality's presence in the sector. The transition of management will affect a considerable number of employees and guests at these hotels. The agreement between the two companies marks a pivotal moment for both parties involved, with Schulte Hospitality gaining access to a diverse range of hotel properties to manage.

data.title: HealthStream (Nasdaq: HSTM) to discuss Q4 & full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 24, 2026. Results to be released on Feb 23.
data.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn.--HealthStream, Inc., a prominent healthcare technology platform firm specializing in workforce solutions, declared plans to conduct a conference call and webcast to review its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, February 24, 2026. The Company will unveil its financial outcomes for the said periods ended December 31, 2025, subsequent to the usual market closing time on Monday, February 23. HealthStream, trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol HSTM, aims to provide insights on its financial standing during the call.

data.title: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) stock down, fell by around 15% in last six months. Shareholders approve acquisition by Kimberly-Clark Corp. Merger to enhance innovation and create global health and wellness leader. CEO confident in growth opportunities.
data.description: Kenvue Inc.'s shares on NYSE (KVUE) are down in premarket trading, currently falling by 15% over the past six months with no recent news to explain the decline. The company is in the process of being acquired by Kimberly-Clark Corporation (KMB), with shareholders from both companies approving the acquisition at a Special Meeting, with 99% of votes in favor. The transaction is set to close in the second half of 2026 pending regulatory approval. The merger aims to create a global health and wellness leader by combining resources and brands, such as Tylenol and Listerine. Kenvue's CEO, Kirk Perry, is optimistic about the growth opportunities that lie ahead for the merged entity. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: LG and Will.i.am launch XBoom Buds Plus & Buds Lite with advanced audio for various users, enhancing sound experience.
data.description: LG Electronics and will.i.am have joined forces to launch the latest xboom Buds Plus and Buds Lite earbuds, designed to cater to the needs of audiophiles, jetsetters, and everyday music enthusiasts. This release expands upon their successful collaboration, emphasizing the importance of premium sound experiences in enriching daily life. The new earbuds promise unparalleled audio quality and convenience, with the xboom Buds Lite offering a more affordable option for budget-conscious consumers. This partnership showcases a commitment to innovation in the audio industry and is set to resonate with a wide range of users looking for superior sound performance.

data.title: E-Power partners with Kehui Int'l to launch E-Power Grid Inc. USA for microgrid venture in AIDC, power equipment.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, E-Power Inc. revealed the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Kehui International Ltd to create a joint venture in the USA. The partnership will lead to the formation of E-Power Grid Inc. USA, concentrating on growing sectors of microgrids for AIDC, power equipment, and power automation. E-Power, also known as the Company, finalized the deal with its partner Kehui International Ltd, to establish the new entity in the United States under the NASDAQ symbol EPOW. This venture aims to capitalize on the expanding markets for microgrids and related technologies.

data.title: Torreon Group launches ABOA Real Estate division focusing on strategic property acquisitions in US markets.
data.description: A new division named ABOA Real Estate has been established by Torreon Group, Inc. (OTCID: NXTN), a company based in the U.S. and Mexico, to focus on acquiring properties in high-growth markets across the United States and generating recurring rental income. This announcement was made on February 12, 2026, in Sahuarita, Arizona.

data.title: Ethereum aims for $2,400 rebound by March 2026, now trading at $1,983 with oversold RSI at 30.73. Recovery expected in 6-8 weeks.
data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum stands at $1,983 with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating oversold conditions at 30.73. Technical analysis forecasts a possible rebound towards the $2,400 resistance mark within the next 6 to 8 weeks, considering the existing support levels.

data.title: Hyatt's Q4 sales miss but adjusted profit beats expectations. Sales: $1.789B, EBITDA: $292M (up 14.6% Y/Y), profit: $1.33.
data.description: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) has excelled in its luxury hotel segment with strong growth in the fourth quarter of FY25. Despite falling short on sales with $1.789 billion compared to the expected $1.802 billion, the company surpassed earnings expectations. Adjusted EBITDA saw a significant increase of 14.6% year-over-year, reaching $292 million. Excluding asset sales from 2024, adjusted EBITDA still rose by 3.8% year-over-year. Gross fees experienced a solid 4.5% year-over-year growth, amounting to $307 million in the quarter. Hyatt Hotels reported an adjusted profit of $1.33 per share, well above the consensus of 45 cents. The market reaction to this performance was reflected in premarket trading with Hyatt's shares trading lower.

data.title: Birkenstock's Q1 2026 sales hit $468M, up 11.1% Y/Y. Adjusted EPS at 31 cents. Margins cut by tariffs, currency swings.
data.description: Birkenstock Holding plc (NYSE: BIRK) saw its stock price decline following the release of their first-quarter fiscal 2026 results. Quarterly sales totaled $467.9 million, slightly below the expected $468.5 million. Sales increased by 11.1% year over year, driven by strong holiday demand. Adjusted earnings per share stood at 31 cents, surpassing the anticipated 30 cents. Revenue growth was observed across all segments year over year: Americas rose by 5% (14% in constant currency), EMEA by 16% (17% constant currency), and APAC led with a 28% increase (37% constant currency). Adjusted EBITDA climbed by 4% year over year to 106 million euros, but the margin shrank by 170 basis points to 26.5%. The decrease was mainly due to adverse currency translations which cut margins by 230 basis points, as well as increased U.S. tariffs reducing another 130 basis points. These pressures were somewhat offset... (For full details, refer to the original source.)

data.title: Vital Farms will report Q4 and fiscal year 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: Austin, TX-based Vital Farms, a Certified B Corporation known for its ethically produced foods nationwide, is set to release its financial report for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on December 28, 2025. The report is scheduled to be disclosed on Thursday, February 26, 2026, before the market opens. Following the release, Vital Farms will conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to review the results. For those interested in joining the live call, individuals in North America can dial +1-800-715-9871, while participants from international locations can connect through [to be filled in].
